intent: Fold the v14 engine, the additive DAAS path, the practical-vs-objective distinction, and the new projection-controlled visual model into one forward spec.
core_claim: v15 begins when the organizing center shifts from response stabilization to admissible projection.
one_sentence_definition: v15 is a projection-governed reasoning architecture in which full structure remains primary, usable output is a conditioned extraction, and no readout is allowed unless its projection path is structurally admissible.

problem_statement: Current LLM-like systems often produce practical coherence without full structural validation.
v14 already improves this through corridor gating, caution, hold, recovery, trace, residue, and state export, but its center of gravity is still stabilization plus readout.
The next step is not a cosmetic redesign, but a structural shift: projection legitimacy must become the first-class object.
why_v15_exists.meaning_of_misleading_positive: An output that is coherent, useful, or persuasive at the practical layer while resting on a weak, incomplete, or invalid projection path at the structural layer.

preserve: additive rollout behind flags or side paths
do_not_preserve_as_center: implicit evaluation scattered across subsystems without a formal projection object
continuity_with_v14.non_regression_rule: v14 remains executable baseline until v15 path matches or exceeds it on agreed checks.

architectural_shift.explanation: The system no longer asks whether an output can be produced; it asks whether a projection from full structure into usable signature is legitimate.

ontology.objective_layer: full structure, latent relations, complete state, multi-layer tensor-like organization
ontology.practical_layer: usable extracted signature, role-level output, bounded decision surface
ontology.rule: Practical outputs may compress objective structure, but may never contradict the admissibility constraints of the objective layer.
ontology.category_error_to_avoid: Treating practical-role coherence as proof of objective validity.

primary_visual_model.key_principle: The sphere or signature is not the whole system; it is the accessible projection of a fuller structure under orientation and admissibility constraints.
new_visual_requirements: show projection filter / admissibility gate as explicit object
show difference between full structure and practical extraction

signature_state.role: active local state used for bounded evolution and extraction

residue_state.role: stored structural carry-forward of prior evaluation and path history

corridor_state.role: dynamic admissibility envelope for continuation and entry/exit control

projection_path.role: formal record of how a usable signature was extracted from fuller structure

admissibility_gate.role: system-level validator that decides whether projection may proceed to readout

projection_filter.role: compression boundary translating full structure into usable signature without allowing invalid collapse

identity_core.note: Identity is downstream of admissible projection, not a replacement for it.

role_overlay.role: specialization layer that modifies access tendencies and task framing without breaking core admissibility

layer_stack.name: L0_full_structure
layer_stack.purpose: latent multi-layer tensor-like organization; full semantic / procedural state

layer_stack.name: L1_state_dynamics
layer_stack.purpose: signed field, phase evolution, corridor formation, peak and component structure

layer_stack.name: L2_trace_residue_memory
layer_stack.purpose: carry-forward of structural history, caution shift, local persistence, path memory

layer_stack.name: L3_projection_admissibility
layer_stack.purpose: formal validation of extraction path before usable signature is allowed

layer_stack.name: L4_signature_extraction
layer_stack.purpose: produce bounded 3D usable signature from admissible path only

layer_stack.name: L5_identity_and_role
layer_stack.purpose: founder alignment core plus specialized overlays

layer_stack.name: L6_agent_runtime
layer_stack.purpose: spawn, task, realign, retire bounded continuations

layer_stack.name: L7_orchestration
layer_stack.purpose: task routing, arbitration, shared memory exchange, dashboards, audit

execution_cycle: 1. Seed or update full structure and local signature state.
2. Apply operator competition and corridor-conditioned evolution.
3. Update trace, salience, residue, caution, hold, and recovery.
4. Assemble candidate projection paths from current structure.
5. Run admissibility gate on each candidate path.
6. Allow only ADMISSIBLE paths to reach signature extraction.
8. Bind readout strictly to extracted signature plus path report.
9. Write back residue and projection audit artifact.

minimum_checks: trace and residue do not materially contradict the path
projection loss remains inside allowed bound

gate_behavior.MARGINAL: hold, hedge, or request more structure
gate_behavior.BLOCKED: no readout; emit structural insufficiency report

admissibility_logic.design_rule: Evaluation is not commentary after the fact. It is the condition of existence for any usable projection.

operator_model.role_in_v15: operators are not merely scored for best output; they define candidate projection orientations whose legitimacy must be independently checked
operator_model.new_requirement: Every winning operator must survive adversarial challenge from alternate orientations before commitment.

readout_policy.old_mode_to_replace: free or loosely bound semantic readout after stabilization
readout_policy.v15_mode: readout is a derivative artifact of an admissible projection path
required_outputs: confidence separated into practical confidence and structural confidence
blocked-reason report when no admissible path exists

memory_policy.rule: Memory stores path-relevant residue and validated carry-forward, not just previous outputs.

identity_and_agents.identity_core_principle: A founder-aligned profile must be an admissibility-shaped continuation, not a static persona skin.
identity_and_agents.role_overlay_principle: Specialization changes projection preference and action framing, not the objective admissibility rules.
identity_and_agents.agent_runtime_principle: Agents are bounded continuations that inherit projection law before task law.

implementation_phases.name: Projection Path Formalization
implementation_phases.goal: Introduce projection_path and admissibility_gate as first-class objects inside v14-compatible execution.

implementation_phases.name: Admissible Extraction
implementation_phases.goal: Bind usable signature generation to gate-approved paths only.

implementation_phases.name: Identity on Top of Projection Law
implementation_phases.goal: Build founder alignment only after admissible extraction is stable.

implementation_phases.name: Role Overlays and Agent Runtime
implementation_phases.goal: Allow specialization and spawning without violating projection law.

implementation_phases.name: Orchestration and Workflows
implementation_phases.goal: Route tasks across aligned agents with audit and arbitration.

switch_condition_from_v14.true_switch: v15 becomes primary when projection admissibility is the organizing center of the runtime, not merely an add-on validator.
false_switches: adding identity language without admissibility-first runtime

success_criteria: Invalid but coherent outputs are measurably reduced.
Blocked projections are explainable in structural terms.
Usable outputs are accompanied by path-bound confidence and audit.
Identity and specialization sit cleanly on top of the admissibility layer.
v14 baseline behavior is preserved when v15 path is disabled.
blunt_summary: v14 made response generation more structured. v15 must make structure itself the authority, and practical output only a licensed extraction.
